## Problem Statement
What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your suggested solution and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add mockups, examples, references, or edge cases that can help evaluate the request.
